headline: Is It Time To Reassess Sodexo (ENXTPA:SW) After Recent Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether Sodexo at €38.62 is starting to look interesting or still carries too much risk, it helps to first step back and look at how the market has been treating the stock recently. Over the last week the share price return was about -14.7%, with a -12.4% move over 30 days and a -26.4% return over the past year, which may catch the eye of investors looking at potential changes in sentiment or risk. These price moves have come alongside ongoing attention on Sodexo's...
